title: Trim SMP Texture Pack
body:
This is the texture pack for the Trim SMP S3 Plugin, It adds a custom sword texture for every single trim in minecraft with different materials
Trimmed Swords:
- Sentry
- Coast
- Snout
- Vex
- Wild
- Silence
- Ward
- Dune
- Wayfinder
- Raiser
- Shaper
- Host
- Tide
- Rib
- Bolt
- Flow
- Spire
- Eye
**Credits to zilixzy for making the textures
**
